headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) Expanding Daily DJX 0DTE Options Trading
summary: Cboe Global Markets recently expanded its Dow Jones Industrial Average index (DJX) options suite by launching daily expiring DJX options, adding Monday–Thursday P.M.-settled contracts (DJXW) alongside existing Friday weekly and third Friday monthly expiries on its C1 and C2 options exchanges. This move extends Cboe’s growing 0DTE ecosystem, where very short-dated contracts now account for about half of its index options activity, potentially deepening liquidity for traders seeking precise,...
